root_cause: Readiness, dry-run, staging, and handoff activity counted as concrete progress
Fleet health could pass without reading delivery outcomes
Sequence correctness was evaluated independently of user-visible delivery
The anti-loop correction hard-coded selected-inpaint instead of portfolio priority

implemented_recovery_controls: Created an authoritative image/video/audio lane portfolio with explicit product classifications and next outcomes
Declared separate API workflows as production architecture and the monolithic Main Flow as reference-only until synchronized
Defined narrow delivery truth, DELIVERY_STAGNATION, and PORTFOLIO_STARVATION
Added a bounded deterministic delivery snapshot and validation tool
Updated completion vocabulary to prevent bounded proof from being called lane completion
Reconciled stale OpenPose active-lane status against existing target-runtime certification evidence
Updated all seven canonical automation definitions
Updated all seven live project automations through the Codex app scheduler

immediate_recovery_outcomes.outcome: Complete direct QA for the just-finished RealESRGAN target-runtime artifact, then run one fixed end-to-end image benchmark with measured deltas.
Implement one bounded Wan 2.2 image-to-video API workflow and produce a genuine short clip with temporal QA; retain AnimateDiff as fallback.
Select a licensed genuine voice plus Foley/ambience source, render and review a short mix, and mux it to the video deliverable.
Keep separate API workflows authoritative; synchronize the Main Flow deliberately only after the modality graphs are proven.
